Since 1887 • R&M Group
R&M Marine Engineering Services India Pvt. Ltd.

Experts in Detailed Design Engineering — Marine

R&M Marine Engineering Services India Pvt. Ltd. delivers world-class ship design engineering from Chennai, partnering with leading European shipyards for cruise vessels, ferries, RoPax, yachts, and naval vessels.

Who We Are
Expanding Collaborations
Providing partners access to talent and cost structure that boosts competitiveness, leveraging deep-rooted expertise in detailed design engineering for mutual growth in the maritime sector.
⚓

Established 2016

Incorporated in Chennai, Tamil Nadu with a 12,000 sq.ft state-of-the-art design centre, seating capacity for 130 persons, and modern IT infrastructure.

⚖

European Standards

Proven track record with Meyer Turku, Rauma Shipyard, A&R, Lürssen, Fassmer, Blohm+Voss, and other leading European shipyards.

⚙

Cost Competitive

Skilled engineering teams from India. Two-shift operations for continuous availability. Flexible ramp-up during critical project phases.

What We Do
Detailed Design Capabilities
End-to-end detailed design engineering covering accommodation interiors, piping, HVAC, electrical systems, and production drawing extraction.
01

Accommodation & Interior Design

Public spaces, crew areas, cabins, galley, stairs — full 3D modelling and production drawings.

02

Pipe Routing

Machinery, public space, crew and technical space pipe routing with 3D modelling, MTO, and production drawings.

03

HVAC Duct Routing

Complete HVAC duct routing across machinery, public, crew, and technical spaces.

04

Electrical & Cable Tray

Cable tray routing across all zones with system integration and coordination.

05

Equipment Modelling

Detailed 3D equipment modelling with interface management and installation-ready outputs.

06

Insulation & Calculations

Insulation plans, MTO, COG, fire load calculations, and weight estimates.

07

3D Virtual Modelling

Process animation, walk-through videos, virtual mockups for ship interiors, 360° views.

08

Project Management

SharePoint-based collaboration: document, progress, change, and timesheet management. On-site assistance available.

Process Excellence
Quality Assurance
ISO 9001:2015 certified by Bureau Veritas. Classified as a Class A Design Supplier following Meyer Turku’s supplier audit in 2017.
1

Drawing Preparation

Customer inputs, scope of work, class standards, yard standards, previous project references.

2

Design Verification

Work verification, quality checks, interface checks, documentation, revision control by Team Leader.

3

Approval

Project schedule adherence, quality checks, formal approvals by Managers and CEO.

4

Revision Process

Customer feedback, equipment spec changes, design upgrades, production feedback loop.

Data Security
🔒

Network Security

Closed, firewalled network. All systems protected by antivirus software. Dual internet lines with VPN tunnel for external clients.

🔐

Physical Security

Biometric workplace access. Locked server room with restricted entry. No personal storage devices permitted.

💾

Data Protection

Password-restricted, need-based data access. All project data under custody of the Project Coordinator.
